title: Path Depth Pill
problem: The direct Path cockpit was becoming too scroll-heavy because the default Stage Depth selector consumed a full row inside the main game board. The operator needs one-screen stage controls first, with deeper archive and utility panels available only when explicitly opened.
implementation: Converted the default Stage Depth dock into an absolute floating pill when the Path board is in one-screen Stage mode.
Kept Archive and Tools as full depth modes, so deep panels still expand intentionally after selection.
Added a subtle scan animation and glass treatment to make the selector feel like a game HUD control rather than another dashboard row.
Reserved bottom clearance inside the Core Deck so the floating pill does not feel accidental.
Updated docs, cache tags, and regression coverage.

verification.result: failed before implementation because the default Stage Depth pill selectors did not exist

nextAction: Continue replacing tall dashboard stacks with compact game HUD layers, then raise animation quality with purpose-built lane motion and richer agent art.
